# Senior Services Adult Family Home

> Licensed adult family home in Mount Vernon, WA serving Skagit County families with private bedrooms, 24-hour personalized senior care, and dementia support.

Senior Services Adult Family Home is a six-resident licensed adult family home at 3707 Trumpeter Ct, Mount Vernon, WA 98273. We serve Mount Vernon, Burlington, Sedro-Woolley, Anacortes, La Conner, and the surrounding Skagit County and Washington communities.

## Pages

- [Home](/heritage): Overview of our adult family home, philosophy, and current bedroom availability.
- [About](/heritage/about): Our story, caregivers, and how we approach senior care.
- [Services](/heritage/services): Daily living support, meals, medication management, dementia care, and 24-hour supervision.
- [Bedrooms](/heritage/rooms): Six private bedrooms with photos, amenities, and live availability.
- [Admissions](/heritage/admissions): Our five-step admissions process, Medicaid and private pay options, and RCW 70.128.280 disclosures.
- [Resources](/heritage/resources): Guides for Skagit County families researching adult family home care.
- [Tour](/heritage/tour): Book an in-person visit.
- [Contact](/heritage/contact): Phone, email, and inquiry form.

## Optional
